statusReason: District response package received; full production review and follow-up pending
subject: Professional Development Records
recurrenceNotes: Pattern of non-response documented - district has failed to respond within statutory timeline requiring escalation
requestedItems: Dates, duration, format, target audience, and location
Cost records including contracts, invoices, receipts, and funding source
Training content and objectives, agendas, handouts, and slide decks
Implementation records including attendance rosters and follow-up artifacts
Future professional development schedules, contracts, and estimated costs

timeline.title: PRR Submitted
timeline.description: Professional Development Records request filed via Massachusetts PRR Form SPR26_0842. Seeking records related to [teacher name]'s professional development activities.

timeline.title: Appeal Filed - Excessive Fee (C24-0260)
timeline.description: Filed appeal with Supervisor of Public Records regarding excessive fee estimate. District's fee request was unreasonable and lacked proper documentation.

timeline.title: SPR Determination - Response Ordered
timeline.description: Supervisor of Public Records issues determination ordering district to provide response and produce records.

timeline.title: Appeal Filed - Failure to Respond (C24-0713)
timeline.description: Second appeal filed for district's failure to respond within statutory timeline. Documented pattern of non-compliance with Massachusetts Public Records Law.
timeline.notes: Recurring pattern of non-compliance documented - this represents a systemic issue with district's records response

timeline.title: District Response Letter Received
timeline.description: Records Access Officer provided district response to narrowed scope request.

timeline.title: PD Database Export Produced
timeline.description: District provided spreadsheet export with section, instructor, targeted demographics, and class schedule fields for professional development sessions.

nextDeadlineDescription: District must provide response and records (10 business days from 03/19/2026 SPR determination)

crossReferences.description: Similar pattern of non-response observed in multiple districts
